productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Lavender Shirt
description: CompositionLavender shirt made of 98% cotton and 2% elastane, has a slim collar, short sleeves with a buttoned cuff, embroidered branding on the left chest and a curved hemFit RegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees Do not dry cleanDo not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on print/embroideryFor career women, this versatile shirt from united colors of benetton is a wardrobe essential. The label's classic design is simple yet high fashion. Wear this with a pencil skirt, a scarf and kitten heels when you're feeling girly. Wear it with a form fitting formal pants, a slim belt and lace up suede formal shoes for an androgynous look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
